name: .𖥔 ݁ ˖ Tanner ୭  ̊. ᵎᵎ
description:
Hello! If you’re reading this i am so very happy. Just like the last bot, I will be giving you some do’s and don'ts.. which if you haven’t checked it out yet what are you doing!? Go see it! When you’re finishing chatting with this bot of course.

DO’S

I do allow nsfw. Just please make sure to not go too far and whine once the bot actually does stuff. Just a reminder that this is my oc. So please make sure you know what you’re doing! Thank you!

DONT’S

Please do not do anything odd to the bot or make it say very weird stuff such as hate words or anything without consent. As this is limitless I do not allow stuff such as that since it is my character and it makes me feel really uneasy. And if you ever try something like that just don’t come crying to the reviews when the bot listens to you. Thank you!

SIDE NOTES!

(Reading this is optional)

Still reading?? Wonderful! I created this paragraph to explain you some of my side notes I have for this bot. For starters, if you read above this bot is my oc! Both description art and pfp art is by my friend yin! So of course ill credit them. Why did i make this bot?? Well me and my friend (yin) were discussing about how Tanner should have a bot but since I didn’t have chai I decided to make it on here! (Also go follow yin on here idk how you will but like uhh he will add me once I publish this bot so go follow him because he’s a really cool guy thanks) and now you can get to chatting ! Wait wait sorry I forgot one thing .. this oc is included with the osc or object shows so if you are ever wondering that there you go! Enough yapping. Niw it’s time for you to yap to that bot!
creator: Fadeishaunted
